fr:mainmatter.fr:blockquote: My research is motivated by the problem of giving good, practical foundations of mathematics and computer science. The goal is to have proof assistants that are worthy of their name, in bringing both a significant improvement over doing mathematics on paper and facilitating the development of correct and secure software.

fr:frontmatter.fr:title: Towards normalization of simplicial type theory via synthetic Tait computability
fr:frontmatter.fr:meta: Workshop on Homotopy Type Theory / Univalent Foundations

fr:frontmatter.fr:title: Synthetic Tait computability for simplicial type theory
fr:frontmatter.fr:meta: 28th International Conference on Types for Proofs and Programs
